capabilities.title: F5 自动归档当前 run 并更新归档索引
capabilities.summary: 实现当项目全部 feature 完成时自动归档 progress 快照并写入 progress_history 索引；已通过专用测试并完成验收收尾。

capabilities.title: Re-init Archive Naming Standardization
capabilities.summary: Implemented collision-safe archive ID generation with timestamps for prog init --force. Old progress files are now archived with traceable metadata instead of being overwritten.

capabilities.title: Feature 16: link-project command
capabilities.summary: 实现 link-project 命令，支持注册子项目并管理 RouteV1 schema。包含项目代码验证、冲突检测、去重逻辑，8个测试全部通过

capabilities.title: RouteV1 Preflight Fail-Closed Enforcement
capabilities.summary: Unified route_preflight gate for child tracker mutating commands with fail-closed policy for route ownership mismatches. Includes parent discovery, multi-parent ambiguity detection, and deterministic recovery guidance.

capabilities.title: F19 RouteV1 route_preflight fail-closed
capabilities.summary: 实现统一 route_preflight 机制：所有 mutating 命令（next/done/add-feature/update-feature/complete）在执行前调用 enforce_route_preflight()，路由不匹配时 fail-closed 并给出 cd + --project-root 恢复指令

capabilities.title: [RouteV1] 并行 active_routes 冲突策略（允许执行+强告警）
capabilities.summary: Implemented Type C conflict detection in progress tracker for parallel active routes. Displays [WARNING] Parallel Active Routes in status output and route_select command when multiple project_codes are active, but allows operations to continue (non-blocking). Added regression tests for both CLI outputs and internal logic.

capabilities.title: review_router 智能分流
capabilities.summary: 实现 review_router.py，按 change_categories 计算 required/pending/passed lanes；design/devex 可选，eng/qa/docs 强制；集成到 set_current() 和 cmd_done() gate

capabilities.title: Monorepo Mixed Host Architecture
capabilities.summary: F10 implemented root-level /prog support with Pull-based dashboard, ROOT dispatch, child discovery, queue management, and summary freshness. Code review fixed 2 Critical and 4 Important issues before merge.

capabilities.title: Refactor progress_manager into modular command helpers
capabilities.summary: Extracted handoff and completion prompt builders into progress_prompt_builders.py; added defensive workflow_state init in set_current(); 3 regression tests passing

capabilities.title: plan_path CLI normalization
capabilities.summary: Added _normalize_plan_path_cli_arg() to convert absolute paths under project root to relative paths at CLI dispatch layer, and improved validate_plan_path error message with format examples.

capabilities.title: Enforce plugin metadata traceability fields
capabilities.summary: Added repository and homepage fields to all 4 marketplace plugin.json manifests with a repo-level contract test that dynamically traverses marketplace.json to enforce presence and exact values

capabilities.title: Apply progressive disclosure budget to oversized SKILL files
capabilities.summary: F5: 将 9 个超标 SKILL.md 文件中的长篇示例/模板/算法提取到 references/ 和 examples/ 子目录，所有文件降至 SOP 门禁 500 行以下，链接完整性全部通过，发现契约测试 3/3 通过。评估器评分 91/100。
